mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product ( name, category, price, rent_price, product_type,deposit, stock, description, status, owner_id, owner_name, create_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{rentPrice},#{productType}, #{deposit}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{status}, #{ownerId}, #{ownerName}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, rent_price = #{rentPrice}, product_type = #{productType}, deposit = #{deposit}, stock = #{stock}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = #{stock}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{productId} AND status = 1 AND stock > 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, stock = #{stock}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM product GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
